name: The Winter Starvation
description: The snow lies deep and the stores are nearly empty. Desperation turns to anger in the frozen dark.

choices.label: Ration the last of the food
choices.description: Everyone goes hungry, but everyone lives.

choices.label: Forage in the blizzards
choices.description: Send hunters out into the storm. Some might not return.

name: The Commander's Share
description: Whispers in the barracks have turned into shouts. The guards claim they take all the risk and demand better rations.

choices.label: Punish the ringleaders
choices.description: An iron fist stops a mutiny, but breaks morale.

choices.label: Speak to their honor
choices.description: Remind them of the oaths they swore.

name: The Stranded Envoy
description: An envoy from a neighboring city-state has been trapped by the dark on your roads.

choices.label: Turn them away
choices.description: We barely have enough for our own.
